series_metadata.series_description: File contains service order receipts for service performed on miscellaneous office equipment, i.e., copier time/date stamp, printer and fax machine.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 1 year and 1 year in the records center , then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 1 year and 1 year in the records center , then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
